name: magnet2torrent
short_description: Convert magnet URIs to torrent files using libtorrent with DHT and proxy support.
long_description: A command-line tool that converts magnet URIs and info hashes to .torrent files by downloading metadata from the BitTorrent swarm without downloading file content. The tool implements a two-stage approach: it first attempts fast HTTP downloads from torrent cache sites (itorrents.org, hash2torrent.com, etc.), then falls back to peer-based metadata retrieval using libtorrent. It supports SOCKS5 proxies for peer connections, HTTP proxies for cache site requests, optional DHT peer discovery, and automatically augments tracker lists with curated public trackers to improve connectivity. Configuration is managed through command-line arguments or environment variables via .env files.

modules.description: Core functionality for converting magnets to torrents, handling cache site lookups, libtorrent session management, metadata fetching, and tracker management.
Command-line interface with argument parsing for magnet URIs, proxy configuration, output directory, and DHT/quiet options.
Configuration management loading environment variables from .env files, setting defaults for proxy, DHT, tracker URLs, and cache directories.
